data.title: AC1 contradiction in f493-bf4e: run-all.sh exits non-zero due to new RED test
data.description: Acceptance criterion 1 of task f493-bf4e requires bash tests/run-all.sh to exit 0. However, AC2 requires new test cases to FAIL (RED). These are mutually contradictory: run-all.sh exits 0 only when ALL suites pass, and the new RED test test_review_tier_valid_value_passes causes the hook suite to exit non-zero. The .test-index RED marker already exists and the pre-commit test gate tolerates the failure, but the literal AC1 criterion cannot be satisfied. Options: (1) update AC1 to acknowledge expected non-zero exit from run-all.sh during RED phase, (2) verify that existing .test-index marker satisfies the intent of AC1, or (3) restructure the criterion.
